title: Phymatosorus longifolius
taxonomy: Phymatosorus longifolius is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae. It is a type of fern native to Australia. This plant belongs to the genus Phymatosorus, which is a group of ferns commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The species is also known as the Long-leaved Snake Palm or Snake Palm, but it is not closely related to the true palms. The classification of Phymatosorus longifolius is still being studied and refined by botanists.
